source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Low Back Pain – 15
source.population: Adults presenting with acute low back pain.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for acute adult low-back-pain telehealth documentation in Dubai; partial for chronic pain, in-person examination, and settings outside Dubai.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Low Back Pain – 15
source.population: Adults presenting with acute low back pain.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for acute adult low-back-pain telehealth documentation in Dubai; partial for chronic pain, in-person examination, and settings outside Dubai.

exact_location.heading: 2. Scope; 3. Purpose; 4. Applicability; 5–6 Virtual assessment and clinical history

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports acute low-back-pain terminology and pain site, onset, duration, severity, character, radiation, aggravating factors, injury mechanism, prior treatment, function, and patient concerns.

items.rationale: The exact DHA acute low-back-pain history section supports onset, duration, severity, functional impact, associated symptoms, relevant negatives and risk context without asserting a cause.

items.final_wording: Lists weight loss, fever, night sweats, malignancy, osteoporosis, weakness, gait instability, sensory change, bowel or bladder dysfunction, trauma, infection, injection drugs, corticosteroids, and recent spinal procedures.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Low Back Pain – 15
source.population: Adults presenting with acute low back pain.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for acute adult low-back-pain telehealth documentation in Dubai; partial for chronic pain, in-person examination, and settings outside Dubai.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists weight loss, fever, night sweats, malignancy, osteoporosis, weakness, gait instability, sensory change, bowel or bladder dysfunction, trauma, infection, injection drugs, corticosteroids, and recent spinal procedures.

items.rationale: The exact red-flag section supports recording time-critical symptoms only when the clinician assessed them.

items.final_wording: Describes cauda-equina symptom combinations and limits imaging in short-duration low back pain without associated concern features.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Low Back Pain – 15
source.population: Adults presenting with acute low back pain.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for acute adult low-back-pain telehealth documentation in Dubai; partial for chronic pain, in-person examination, and settings outside Dubai.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Describes cauda-equina symptom combinations and limits imaging in short-duration low back pain without associated concern features.

items.rationale: The exact cauda-equina and imaging section supports documenting existing imaging or test status only when already performed or reviewed, without recommending imaging.

items.final_wording: Defines urgent and specialist review for severe or night pain, infection, trauma, neurological deficit, urinary or faecal dysfunction, systemic disease, persistent symptoms, and selected imaging needs.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Low Back Pain – 15

source.exclusions: Direct for acute adult low-back-pain telehealth documentation in Dubai; partial for chronic pain, in-person examination, and settings outside Dubai.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines urgent and specialist review for severe or night pain, infection, trauma, neurological deficit, urinary or faecal dysfunction, systemic disease, persistent symptoms, and selected imaging needs.

items.rationale: The exact referral section supports recording escalation, specialist discussion or arranged follow-up only when clinician-decided.

added_items.final_wording: Supports acute low-back-pain terminology and pain site, onset, duration, severity, character, radiation, aggravating factors, injury mechanism, prior treatment, function, and patient concerns.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Low Back Pain – 15
source.population: Adults presenting with acute low back pain.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for acute adult low-back-pain telehealth documentation in Dubai; partial for chronic pain, in-person examination, and settings outside Dubai.

exact_location.heading: 2. Scope; 3. Purpose; 4. Applicability; 5–6 Virtual assessment and clinical history

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports acute low-back-pain terminology and pain site, onset, duration, severity, character, radiation, aggravating factors, injury mechanism, prior treatment, function, and patient concerns.

added_items.rationale: The exact DHA acute low-back-pain history section supports onset, duration, severity, functional impact, associated symptoms, relevant negatives and risk context without asserting a cause.

added_items.final_wording: Lists weight loss, fever, night sweats, malignancy, osteoporosis, weakness, gait instability, sensory change, bowel or bladder dysfunction, trauma, infection, injection drugs, corticosteroids, and recent spinal procedures.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Low Back Pain – 15
source.population: Adults presenting with acute low back pain.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for acute adult low-back-pain telehealth documentation in Dubai; partial for chronic pain, in-person examination, and settings outside Dubai.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists weight loss, fever, night sweats, malignancy, osteoporosis, weakness, gait instability, sensory change, bowel or bladder dysfunction, trauma, infection, injection drugs, corticosteroids, and recent spinal procedures.

added_items.rationale: The exact red-flag section supports recording time-critical symptoms only when the clinician assessed them.

added_items.final_wording: Describes cauda-equina symptom combinations and limits imaging in short-duration low back pain without associated concern features.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Low Back Pain – 15
source.population: Adults presenting with acute low back pain.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for acute adult low-back-pain telehealth documentation in Dubai; partial for chronic pain, in-person examination, and settings outside Dubai.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Describes cauda-equina symptom combinations and limits imaging in short-duration low back pain without associated concern features.

added_items.rationale: The exact cauda-equina and imaging section supports documenting existing imaging or test status only when already performed or reviewed, without recommending imaging.

added_items.final_wording: Defines urgent and specialist review for severe or night pain, infection, trauma, neurological deficit, urinary or faecal dysfunction, systemic disease, persistent symptoms, and selected imaging needs.

added_items.rationale: The exact referral section supports recording escalation, specialist discussion or arranged follow-up only when clinician-decided.
